services.name: Basic Consultation
services.description: A focused 30-minute session to address a specific question or challenge. Ideal for quick advice and clarity.

services.name: Standard Consultation
services.description: A 60-minute in-depth session covering your goals, challenges, and a clear action plan tailored to your needs.

services.name: Premium Consultation
services.description: A comprehensive 90-minute strategy session with follow-up notes and a personalised roadmap delivered within 24 hours.

services.name: Free Discovery Call
services.description: A complimentary 15-minute introductory call to understand your needs and explore how we can work together.
